concept.title: Migration Job Lifecycle
concept.shortdesc: Use the lifecycle to plan safe checkpoints from discovery through applied execution.

conbody.p: A migration job is a controlled sequence of observable artifacts. You can run this sequence with one run command or with explicit stage commands.

image.alt: Package input through discover, normalize, plan, execute dry-run, and execute apply.

strow.stentry: Does inventory and relationship extraction match package reality?
Is there exactly one main_map for planning?
Are action types, targets, and reasons correct?
Did outcomes and timings match intent?

section.title: When to use run versus stepwise commands
section.p: Use run when you want fast end-to-end orchestration with standard behavior. Use stepwise commands when you need to inspect or modify artifacts between boundaries, or when you are validating plugin behavior.
